name: Pickled Onions
recipeInstructions:
1 Scald the onions for 2 minutes in boiling water, then dip into cold water and peel.
2 Sprinkle the onions with the salt. Add enough cold water to cover, then let stand for 12 hours or overnight.
3 In the morning, drain the onions and rinse them in cold fresh water. Drain again.
4 Combine the sugar, vinegar, mustard seeds, and horseradish (or peppercorns) in a saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer for 15 minutes.
5 Pack the onions into clean jars. Add 1 small hot pepper and 1 bay leaf to each jar. Fill the jars with boiling-hot liquid and seal.
Makes 5 - 6 pints.
Optional: You can also add 3 Tablespoons whole allspice or 2/3 Cup mixed pickling spices for interesting variations.
